infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Workly needs access to your photo library to upload images and videos to your posts, portfolio, and reviews.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Workly needs access to save photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Workly needs access to your camera to take photos for your posts and portfolio.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Workly needs access to your microphone to record videos for your posts and portfolio.
